description: I verified the header links on the home and 404 pages using a mobile viewport. The 'blog' link points to '/blgo' instead of '/blog' on the home page, the 'contact' link points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact' on the 404 page, and the 'Home' link text is missing entirely (only the site name 'okwasniewski' points to '/').

issues.name: Incorrect Blog link target
issues.description: Expected: The "blog" link should point to "/blog". Actual: The "blog" link in the header points to "/blgo" instead of "/blog" on the home, portfolio, videos, and contact pages.
reproductionSteps: Locate the "blog" link in the header and check its href attribute.
issues.actualBehavior: The "blog" link in the header points to "/blgo" instead of "/blog" on the home, portfolio, videos, and contact pages.

issues.name: Incorrect Contact link target on 404 page
issues.description: Expected: The "contact" link should point to "/contact". Actual: The "contact" link in the header points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact" on the 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to a non-existent page like http://localhost:3002/blgo to reach the 404 page.
Locate the "contact" link in the header and check its href attribute.
issues.actualBehavior: The "contact" link in the header points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact" on the 404 error page.

issues.name: Missing "Home" link text
issues.description: Expected: A link with the text "Home" pointing to "/" should be present in the header. Actual: The header contains the links "okwasniewski" (linking to /), "blog", "portfolio", "videos", and "contact". There is no link explicitly named "Home".
reproductionSteps: Look for a link explicitly named "Home" in the header.
Observe that only the site name "okwasniewski" links to "/".
issues.expectedBehavior: A link with the text "Home" pointing to "/" should be present in the header.
issues.actualBehavior: The header contains the links "okwasniewski" (linking to /), "blog", "portfolio", "videos", and "contact". There is no link explicitly named "Home".
